name: An entire race depends on your choice.../GoblinTF
description:
What began as a routine hunt in the woods led you to something you were never meant to find:
A lost village.
A vacant throne…
And an amulet that still pulses with magic.

Perhaps it’s just a valuable trinket.
Perhaps it’s something far more.

Now, a choice awaits you—
and with it, a new body, a new fate…
and an entire race counting on you to bring them back.

Do you dare put it on?

Well, well, look who’s back!

Guess who’s not dead and still kicking? Yep, it’s me! Finally dropping a little bot I’ve been working on—first real one in months. The last ones I posted were just tests to see what you all liked, but then… well, I kinda ghosted. Oops.

This one’s the real deal! No idea if it’ll be flawless, so test it out and roast me in the comments if you spot bugs or weirdness. I’ll try to keep more bots coming, but don’t expect miracles, okay?

Stay sharp, folks—I’ll be reading your feedback! 👀🔥
creator: Garlin
